title: coleus andongensis
intro: Coleus andongensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Coleus andongensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
